parameters.query:
WITH total_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM modern_studies_raw msr
  JOIN herb_disease_associations hda ON msr.association_id = hda.association_id
),
next_paper AS (
  SELECT
    msr.pmid,
    msr.herb_id,
    msr.disease_id,
    msr.association_id,
    msr.title,
    msr.abstract,
    msr.mesh_terms,
    msr.journal,
    total_count.cnt AS batch_total
  FROM modern_studies_raw msr
  JOIN herb_disease_associations hda ON msr.association_id = hda.association_id
  CROSS JOIN total_count
  LEFT JOIN modern_studies_classified msc ON msr.pmid = msc.pmid 
  WHERE msr.study_classified = false  -- Unclassified only (our flag)
  ORDER BY msr.fetched_at ASC
)
SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS batch_position
FROM next_paper;

parameters.text:
=Classify the scientific design and evidence strength of this modern study.

**MANDATE**: Classify STUDY TYPE ONLY. Do NOT change pmid, herb_id, or association_id — copy them exactly from INPUT.

**INPUT**:
- PMID: {{ $json.pmid }}
- Herb ID: {{ $json.herb_id }}
- Association ID: {{ $json.association_id }}
- Title: {{ $json.title }}
- Abstract: {{ $json.abstract }}

**CLASSIFICATION RULES**:
study_type → ONE OF: insilico | invitro | invivo | clinicaltrial | review | metaanalysis | casestudy
validation_level → ONE OF: preliminary | established | conclusive | insufficient

**SKIP** → return exactly {} (nothing else) ONLY IF abstract is blank/null.
**OTHERWISE** → always return full JSON, default to review + insufficient + 0.7 confidence.

**OUTPUT** (valid JSON only, no markdown):
{
  "pmid": "{{ $json.pmid }}",
  "herb_id": {{ $json.herb_id }},
  "association_id": {{ $json.association_id }},
  "study_type": "<ONE OF: insilico|invitro|invivo|clinicaltrial|review|metaanalysis|casestudy>",
  "validation_level": "<ONE OF: preliminary|established|conclusive|insufficient>",
  "phytochemicals": <[] OR ["curcumin", "piperine"] - exact names from abstract>,
  "targets": <[] OR ["COX-2", "TNF-α"] - exact names from abstract>,
  "sample_size": <null OR integer e.g. 45>,
  "p_value": <null OR decimal e.g. 0.023>,
  "significance_reported": <true/false>,
  "llm_confidence": <your estimate 0.7-0.95>
}

**STRICT RULES**:
- pmid/herb_id/association_id: COPY EXACTLY from INPUT — never change, never invent
- phytochemicals/targets: exact names from abstract only, empty array if none
- sample_size: integer only if explicitly stated, else null
- p_value: decimal only if explicitly stated, else null
- significance_reported: true only if paper states p<0.05 or "significant"
- llm_confidence: 0.7 (uncertain) → 0.95 (very clear)
- {} ONLY for blank abstract — never for valid studies

parameters.query:
WITH assoc AS (
  SELECT tc.category_id
  FROM herb_disease_associations hda
  JOIN therapeutic_categories tc
    ON tc.category_name = hda.disease_category
  WHERE hda.association_id = {{ $json.association_id }}
)
INSERT INTO modern_studies_classified (
  pmid,
  herb_id,
  category_id,
  association_id,
  study_type,
  validation_level,
  phytochemicals_identified,
  biological_targets,
  sample_size,
  p_value,
  significance_reported,
  llm_confidence,
  classification_notes
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.pmid }},
  {{ $json.herb_id }},
  assoc.category_id,
  {{ $json.association_id }},
  '{{ $json.study_type }}',
  '{{ $json.validation_level }}',
  {{ $json.phytochemicals_identified && $json.phytochemicals_identified !== '{}' ? "'" + $json.phytochemicals_identified.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text[]" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.biological_targets && $json.biological_targets !== '{}' ? "'" + $json.biological_targets.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text[]" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.sample_size !== null ? $json.sample_size : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.p_value !== null ? $json.p_value : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.significance_reported }},
  {{ $json.llm_confidence }},
  {{ $json.classification_notes && $json.classification_notes.trim() !== '' ? "'" + $json.classification_notes.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
FROM assoc
ON CONFLICT (pmid, category_id) DO UPDATE SET
  herb_id                  = EXCLUDED.herb_id,
  association_id           = EXCLUDED.association_id,
  study_type               = EXCLUDED.study_type,
  validation_level         = EXCLUDED.validation_level,
  phytochemicals_identified = EXCLUDED.phytochemicals_identified,
  biological_targets       = EXCLUDED.biological_targets,
  sample_size              = EXCLUDED.sample_size,
  p_value                  = EXCLUDED.p_value,
  significance_reported    = EXCLUDED.significance_reported,
  llm_confidence           = EXCLUDED.llm_confidence,
  classification_notes     = EXCLUDED.classification_notes;

UPDATE modern_studies_raw
SET study_classified = true,
    processed        = true
WHERE pmid           = {{ $json.pmid }}
  AND association_id = {{ $json.association_id }};
